title: Connected Rocks
description: Connect rock-like blocks with support for mods like Cobblemon, Biomes O' Plenty, Oh The Biomes We've Gone, etc...
body: [![Modrinth - My other projects](https://img.shields.io/badge/modrinth-My_other_projects-00AF5C?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/user/Jacosvaldo) [![Discord - Jacosvaldo's Not Too Cool Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Jacosvaldo%27s%20_Not_Too_Cool_Server-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.com/invite/cPYyf3JqgU) [![Kofi - Tip me](https://img.shields.io/badge/kofi-Tip_me-F26B2E?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi)](https://ko-fi.com/jacosvaldo) ## 🧩 Dependencies **OptiFine** OR [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) are required! ## ✨ For Vanilla Players If you're just playing with vanilla blocks, I highly recommend you to use the [Fusion version](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-rocks-(fusion)) of this texture since it's lighther and have way faster loading times (and some small extra features). ## ⚠️ Connected Series This texture is part of a series of textures. Consider also checking [Connected Paths](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-paths) and [Connected-Bricks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-bricks) The textures should have the following order at the resourse packs tab for better render order: ![Render order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9126b58d2dcdd4ae5e3c440e94db630b65e5222b.png) ## 🛠️ Mod Support | Mod | Support | Version | | ------------------------ | --------------------------------- | ---------------- | | Cobblemon | ✅ | 1.7.1 | | Cobblemon: Mega Showdown | ✅ | 1.5 | | Biomes O' Plenty | ✅ | 21.1.0.13 | | Oh The Biomes We've Gone | ✅ | 2.5.2 | | Oh The Biomes You'll Go | Planned | - | | BetterNether | ✅ | 21.0.11 | | BetterEnd | When It doesn't crash with Sodium | - | | Deeper and Darker | ✅ | 1.3.3-plus-b-rc2 | | Regions Unexplored | ✅ | 0.5.6.1 | | Pyrellium | ✅ | 0.2.6 | | Create | Planned | - | | Wilder Wild | Planned | - | | Immersive Weathering | Planned | - | | Twigs | Planned | - | | Alex's Caves | Planned | - | | Ad Astra | Planned | - | **Using a different version of the mods will work, but if new blocks have been added they wont connect to anything. You can report it and make suggestions about other mods to add support at [discord](https://discord.gg/cPYyf3JqgU) or [github](https://github.com/Jacosvaldo/Connected-Paths/issues)** ## 💼 My works [![Use code JACOS for 25% discount at Sparked Host servers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c027e7de8616ac177d4267980d53eaacfa9e2022_0.webp)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3074)
